category_sources: Official EasyEngine CLI docs describe EasyEngine as a command-line program for managing WordPress websites with Nginx.
source_facts.description says it is a command-line control panel to manage WordPress sites.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and CLI handbook use EasyEngine branding.

Official EasyEngine docs and commands pages provide product and command references.
